goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'indian' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should 'arrive by 14:00'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve indian food
The restaurant should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should arrive by 14:00
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on friday
Make sure you get travel time
